'''tavala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headjoint|headjoint]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-v-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headjoint|headjoint]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tavala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tævælæth|tævælæth]] || [[word:tævælæj|tævælæj]] || [[word:tævælæsh|tævælæsh]] || [[word:tævælæ|tævælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tavavalath|tavavalath]] || [[word:tavavalaj|tavavalaj]] || [[word:tavavalash|tavavalash]] || [[word:tavavala|tavavala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tavalath|tavalath]] || [[word:tavalaj|tavalaj]] || [[word:tavalash|tavalash]] || [[word:tavala|tavala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tavaflath|tavaflath]] || [[word:tavaflaj|tavaflaj]] || [[word:tavaflash|tavaflash]] || [[word:tavaflaf|tavaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tavalatha|tavalatha]] || [[word:tavalaja|tavalaja]] || [[word:tavalasha|tavalasha]] || [[word:tavalaka|tavalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tavalath|tavalath]] || [[word:tavalaj|tavalaj]] || [[word:tavalash|tavalash]] || [[word:tavala|tavala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tavalathal|tavalathal]] || [[word:tavalajal|tavalajal]] || [[word:tavalashal|tavalashal]] || [[word:tavalakal|tavalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tavalathatha|tavalathatha]] || [[word:tavalajaja|tavalajaja]] || [[word:tavalashasha|tavalashasha]] || [[word:tavalaka|tavalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tavalathan|tavalathan]] || [[word:tavalajan|tavalajan]] || [[word:tavalashan|tavalashan]] || [[word:tavalakan|tavalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tavalathaoro|tavalathaoro]] || [[word:tavalajaoro|tavalajaoro]] || [[word:tavalashaoro|tavalashaoro]] || [[word:tavalakaoro|tavalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
